goal: Make the active-config pilot decision path clear, evidence-driven, and easy to run when its gates truly pass.
activeConfigPilotGateStatus: PASSED (2026-07-12) via the runtime-first Safe Live Save Mode strategy; see structured-family-active-config-write-pilot report for the receipt

autoreloadEvidence.collectedThisRun: read-only getoption misc:disable_autoreload returned bool: false
autoreloadEvidence.meaning: autoreload is active: writing hyprland.conf would make the running compositor reload it immediately, which is a live runtime mutation
autoreloadEvidence.collector: collect_autoreload_evidence in src/structured_family_active_config_pilot.rs issues one read-only option query and fails closed on read/parse failure or a false reading
autoreloadEvidence.hardenedGate: the ignored env-gated pilot test now requires BOTH the operator flag AND live-collected evidence; setting the env variable alone can no longer open the gate

copiedActiveConfigRehearsalStatus: proven in a prior sprint: the real active config content round-tripped (backup, write, verify, restore, verify) in a temp copy with the source untouched; the rehearsal re-runs and re-verifies freshness (content hash drift detection) every time the pilot preflight executes
activeConfigBackupPath: not created - the pilot never reached the backup step

howToUnblock.optionA: set misc:disable_autoreload = true in your Hyprland config (a config decision you make), verify with `hyprctl getoption misc:disable_autoreload`, then run the pilot command below
howToUnblock.optionB: explicitly approve the single compositor reload that the pilot's write-and-restore would trigger, and run the pilot command below with that understanding
howToUnblock.note: even with both flags, all fifteen preflight gates re-evaluate immediately before the write, the live autoreload evidence is re-collected read-only, and the pilot restores the original bytes after verification

sourceGuards: the pilot is unreachable from UI, main, and the scalar write flow
the pilot module contains no hyprctl literals; evidence collection goes through the executor's read-only option helper
the pilot fails closed when autoreload evidence is false or missing
the operator env flag alone cannot open the gate (live evidence is also required)
testsAdded: hardened ignored pilot test combining operator flag with live evidence
validation: cargo test green; the pilot suite passes with the ignored live test still env-gated
nextRecommendedWork: Pilot passed; the decision path is resolved by runtime-first autoreload control.
